SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORDERO, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARAMBULA, PATRICK $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.70 INTEREST, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.70, DEFENDANT JOSIE ARAMBULA DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
